query:
SELECT id, name, address
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND (complement IS NULL OR complement = '')
  AND (
    address LIKE '%Shopping%' OR address LIKE '%Galeria%' 
    OR address LIKE '% Lj %' OR address LIKE '% Lj.%' OR address LIKE '%- Lj%'
    OR address LIKE '%, conj%' OR address LIKE '%, bloco%'
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
SELECT id, name, address
FROM establishments

  AND (complement IS NULL OR complement = '')
  AND (

    OR address LIKE '% Lj %' OR address LIKE '% Lj.%' OR address LIKE '%- Lj%'
    OR address LIKE '%, conj%' OR address LIKE '%, bloco%'
  );
